content.text:
GOAL: deliver the standalone IU end-to-end
WHERE: demo@iu/B7 — workspace/renderer/widgets, .stack-graph/improvements/B7.md
DO: run specify-slice (unattended) -> build -> review; stop after the review verdict, never run land
DONE-WHEN: acceptance_check passes on the iu/B7 branch
POL: .stack-graph/derived/analyzer-events.jsonl (event-log)
META: carrier=loop-batch-3 kind=standalone-iu arc=incremental iu=B7
